product_description: Implantable cardiac defibrillator with faulty firmware causing intermittent failure to deliver therapy when ventricular fibrillation is detected
Patient monitoring system displaying inaccurate blood oxygen saturation readings due to defective sensor module
Insulin infusion pump delivering incorrect dosage amounts caused by calibration error during manufacturing
Hemodialysis machines shipped with incorrect user manual listing wrong priming volume specifications
Coronary stent system with coating degradation leading to premature drug elution and potential thrombosis
CT scanner software miscalculating radiation dose resulting in patients receiving higher than prescribed exposure levels
Ultrasound transducer probes with cracked housing allowing fluid ingress and risk of electrical shock
Pre-filled saline flush syringes with compromised sterility barrier due to packaging seal defect
Orthopedic hip implant femoral head showing premature wear releasing metallic debris into surrounding tissue
Pacemaker programmer software failing to correctly display battery longevity estimates leading to unexpected device depletion
Surgical mesh with inconsistent tensile strength due to raw material variability from supplier
Ventilator control software entering standby mode unexpectedly during active patient ventilation therapy
MRI system gradient coil overheating during extended scan sequences due to inadequate thermal management design
Continuous glucose monitor transmitter losing wireless connectivity intermittently causing gaps in blood sugar data
IV infusion pump occlusion alarm failing to trigger when fluid line is blocked during medication delivery
